_comment: IDE-only tsconfig for root-level generator scripts + scripts/**. These one-offs are run via tsx and aren't part of the build pipeline (tsc -b only covers the client + vite.config + server). Without this file, the IDE has no tsconfig to apply to e.g. generate-hp-spells.ts and falls back to a config that doesn't pull in @types/node → spurious 'Cannot find name process' errors. Not referenced from any other tsconfig; running `tsc -b` ignores it.
